nodes.label: EZ - Zero Pre-Deployment Indoor Localization Algorithm
nodes.source_file: raw/Sci-Hub. Indoor localization without the pain : Proceedings of the sixteenth annual international co.pdf
nodes.rationale: EZ uses physics constraints of wireless propagation plus a genetic algorithm to solve simultaneous RF environment learning and user localization, requiring only occasional GPS fixes at building entrances - eliminating manual site surveys.
